bundledNote: Under "Your World Included," gratuities for stateroom attendants, butlers, and dining waitstaff are included in the fare for new bookings made on or after 2024-10-01 sailing on or after 2025-01-01. Spa services and La Reserve still carry a 20% service charge.

porterPerBag.note: Embarkation porter, US dollars (off-ship; not covered by the bundled fare).
